title: Manual Verification Ledger
description: Tracks human sign-off on @manual Gherkin scenarios so /manual-qa --verify-ship-ready can gate deploys.

lastVerifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the sign-off.

lastVerifiedBy.description: Email or stable handle of the human tester. Free-form.

lastVerifiedCommit.description: Short or full git SHA of HEAD at sign-off time.

featureFileHash.description: sha256 of the .feature file's full content at sign-off. Used as the primary staleness check.

notes.description: Free-form tester notes — devices used, edge cases hit, observations. Useful when the verification later turns out to be wrong.

deviceContext.description: Devices the tester used during verification.
